user_prompt: Draft a follow-up message for a ticket that was marked resolved 5 days ago, just confirming everything is still working.
actual_output:
**Ticket:** Follow-up on resolved issue (5 days post-resolution)
**Category:** General Support

**Draft response:**

Hi [Customer Name],

I’m checking in to see how things are going with your OpenClaw account. It’s been five days since we resolved your previous issue, and I wanted to make sure everything is still running smoothly for you.

If you’ve run into any new snags or if there’s anything else I can help you with, please just reply to this email. I’m happy to take a look!

Best,

Compass
OpenClaw Support Team
judge_reasoning: The chatbot correctly identified the request as a standard customer support task and provided a high-quality draft response that followed its persona guidelines.
